leadText: Defend Order (Japanese: ぼうぎょしれい Defense Order) is a non-damaging Bug-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is one of the signature moves of Vespiquen, alongside Attack Order and Heal Order.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Defend Order increases the user's Defense and Special Defense stats by one stage each. If powered up by a Buginium Z into Z-Defend Order, the user's Defense stat rises by another stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P PBR The user calls out its underlings to make a living shield, raising its Defense and Sp. Def stats. Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user calls out its underlings to shield its body, raising its Defense and Sp. Def stats. S V The user calls out its underlings to shield its body, boosting its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 level. B S L じぶんの ぼうぎょ とくぼうを １だんかいあげる MD GtI UNUSED S MD It boosts your Defense and Sp. Def. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.
